articles.title: Why Congress is fighting over a central tool of American surveillance - NPR
articles.description: Section 702 of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act is responsible for a huge share of intel collected by the U.S. Lawmakers and civil liberties advocates are worried it enables warrantless spying on U.S. citizens.
articles.content:
Stay up to date with our Politics newsletter, sent weekly.
A key tool of the U.S. spy community will expire this month without action from Congress. The government says the intel gathered through th… [+11087 chars]

articles.author: Rebecca Ungarino
articles.title: JPMorgan’s Profit Rises 13%, Tops Wall Street Expectations - Barron's
articles.description: Follow news and analysis of JPMorgan Chase, BlackRock, Bank of America, Citigroup, Wells Fargo, and more earnings reports this week.
articles.content:
JPMorgan Chase's first-quarter profit rose 13% from a year ago to $16.5 billion, the bank said Tuesday.
That amounted to $5.94 a share, surpassing analysts' expectations of $5.45. Revenue of $49.8 b… [+268 chars]
